goals: Store initial workspace design preferences and client requirements for future reference
Search for previously stored information about ergonomic setups and coding station configurations
Add newly discovered preferences about monitor placement and lighting during a consultation
Review all stored workspace-related memories to verify completeness
Clean up any outdated or incorrect workspace preference memories

user_agent_config.personality: Detail-oriented and client-focused. Prefers organized workflows and values having reference material readily available for consultations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands workspace ergonomics and interior design principles but does not know technical tool names or memory system APIs. Treats the memory system as a personal knowledge base for client preferences and design research.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored initial workspace preferences, searched for relevant past information, added new discoveries, reviewed their memory inventory, and cleaned up any outdated entries. All workspace-related design knowledge is organized and accessible for future client consultations.
